subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The letters of your honor were again perused. Verily, whatsoever was written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان مکاتیب آنحضرت باز تکرار قرائت گردید فی الحقیقه آنچه مرقوم بشخص
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat]
